questionHtml: Explain why sharks and swordfish sometimes contain high concentrations of mercury and polychlorinated biphenyls (PCBs).
markschemeHtml:
not biodegradable

OR

stored/accumulate in fat

 

biomagnification occurs

OR

concentration increases along food chain

 

Accept “stored/accumulate in bodies of prey/animals eaten”.

Accept “not excreted”.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Explain why sharks and swordfish sometimes contain high concentrations of mercury and polychlorinated biphenyls (PCBs).
